summary: EXP-268 P1 patch (projection-convention robustness footnote) added to §4.2.7a. Shows kill survives both R_disc/90 (equator-at-rim) and R_disc/180 (S-pole-at-rim) AE conventions. Distances halve under the alternative; closest-pair Δr (75 km) shifts strict reading from 'max 1' to 'max 2' but every station still 222–2,042 km from path, so 0/9 headline holds. Required Moon altitude under the alternative ≈ 123,000 km, still ~49× published 2,534 km.
notes: Close after EXP-268 integrates into data/sections.json. The three text_patches in EXP-268 are additive footnotes; verified each {find} anchor is uniquely matched in current sections.json. Net section delta ~2,678 chars (~+170 words). All 13 <details> tags remain balanced after patch application. ‎
closes_hole: EXP-260 c1 H1 (curmudgeon labels) / decider-issue H2
